sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107321" key="u(perbate/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερβᾰτ-έον</orth>, <sense id="n107321.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must pass over,</tr_> c. acc., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.709e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
